title: Turkish Doner Kebab Tacos
description: A fusion of Mexican and Turkish flavors, this dish combines the classic doner kebab with the vibrant flavors of Mexico.

ingredients.name: Turkish Doner Kebab Meat (Lamb or Beef)

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Slice the Turkish Doner Kebab Meat into thin strips.
Grill the meat for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few slices of the grilled meat onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of salsa roja, some chopped onions and tomatoes, and a sprinkle of cheese.
Drizzle with lime juice and sprinkle with cilantro.
